creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-03-14 14:03:00 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/xpi-pencil       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Pencil is a free and opensource tool for making diagrams and GUI
  prototyping that everyone can use.
  
  Top features:
  
  * Built-in stencils for diagraming and prototyping
  * Multi-page document with background page
  * On-screen text editing with rich-text supports
  * PNG rasterizing
  * Undo/redo supports
  * Installing user-defined stencils
  * Standard drawing operations: aligning, z-ordering, scaling, rotating...
  * Cross-platforms
  * Adding external objects
  * And much more...
  
  WWW:    http://www.evolus.vn/Pencil/
  
  PR:             ports/132456
  Submitted by:   Ashish Shukla <wahjava at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2288    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/www/xpi-pencil/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/xpi-pencil/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +17 -0     ports/www/xpi-pencil/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +281 -0    ports/www/xpi-pencil/pkg-plist (new)
